The health benefits of this plant include its antimicrobial, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant properties, which can help soothe skin irritations, reduce stress, and protect against cell damage. The bioactive constituents of Santalum uncinatum include santalol, santalenoic acid, and other terpenoids, which contribute to its medicinal properties.
